name: Concurrent Assessment Race Pipeline
description: Concurrency-focused workflow for racing assessments, duplicate events, and multiple workflows.
outcome: Concurrent assessment paths remain correctly linked even under out-of-order completion and duplicate activation pressure.

definition.process_instructions: This playbook is used for race-condition proofs. Multiple work items may be active at once. The concurrent delivery engineer can work several items in parallel, and the concurrency quality and compliance assessors may complete out of order against the same or different subject revisions. The control plane must preserve explicit subject linkage and idempotency.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: concurrent-validation
stages.goal: Concurrent subjects are delivered and assessed cleanly.

checkpoints.name: concurrent-validation
checkpoints.goal: Concurrent subjects are delivered and assessed cleanly.
